heading: Next Steps
body:
You can view and download a [completed version of this app](https://github.com/mongodb-university/spring-ai-demo-app) from
GitHub. You can use the full app to troubleshoot your own
application or to test the functionality quickly.

MongoDB also provides the following developer resources:

- [MongoDB Developer GitHub Repository](https://github.com//mongodb-developer)

- [Spring AI MongoDB Atlas Demo](https://github.com/timotheekelly/springai-mongodb/tree/main)

> **See Also:** [Spring AI Documentation](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/index.html)
>
> [Spring AI MongoDB Atlas Reference](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/mongodb.html)
